title: trisetum flavescens var. alpinum
intro: Trisetum flavescens var. alpinum, also known as alpine wheat grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Trisetum flavescens var. alpinum include reducing inflammation, improving gut health, and acting as a natural antioxidant. Trisetum flavescens var. alpinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice for wound healing and skin issues.
